links.title: Something am feeling
links.description: I look into your eyes and I fall deeply in love. I lose myself into you. You are my all, I want to hold you close. Kiss your lips. Tell you…

links.title: I had two in me…
links.description: I am crazy. I always see them undermine me. I know am not wanted. They once said I was a mistaken baby. I know y’all see that your better…

links.title: It’s always been you…
links.description: I’m amused by love. What does it mean when I say I love you? When I say it, does it make you feel the way I feel ? I feel like dancing. Do…

links.title: That good feeling
links.description: Ever wonder what is a good feeling ? The good feeling you feel when you dance, laugh, smile, joke and sing. Can anyone explain the good…

links.title: I love everyone, do you ?
links.description: We all act like we were meant to be but we are just a matter of circumstance. We are all the same. Don’t judge anyone…
